headline: Wynn Resorts: Increased Competition In A Slowing Market
summary: Wynn Resorts remains a Hold as Macau gaming headwinds and increased competition constrain forward EBITDA growth. Click to read this WYNN stock update.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $134
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Daniel Politzer   maintains Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $135 to $134.
